steps.title: Prerequisites
steps.body: Bridge running. Extended confidence pass for the compact read model: confirm the `path` flag scopes the tree to a subtree, and that `detail: verbose` disables render-only folding. Pick a prefab whose hierarchy has at least one named child to scope to.

steps.title: Stage a prefab (use a hierarchy-bearing fixture)
Scope the tree to a named subtree

payload.path: <a child name from the summary tree>

steps.title: Expected outcomes
items: path-scope response returns only rows matching the subtree; pathScope echoes the filter
verbose response has collapsed: 0 (render-only folding disabled) and more rows than the summary
Size ordering holds: summary <= normal <= verbose
_cache stays "hit" across the drill-down calls (model reused, no re-parse after the first miss)

reset.note: read_asset is read-only; the only artifact is the staged fixture, reverted by the afterStep delete.
